title: Zeeland Boat Rental Guide: Costs, Routes and Tips for 2026
html:
Zeeland, a maritime province in the southwest Netherlands, is ideal for a day afloat. Depart from Roompot Marina for EUR 250, 600 for a half-day motorboat hire, with booking handled via BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Zeeland

Zeeland offers numerous departure points on its Delta waters. Roompot Marina near Kamperland is a popular base with full facilities. You can yacht charter in Zeeland for your chosen dates.

Other options include Middelburg Marina in the historic capital, Veere Harbour on Lake Veerse Meer, and Zierikzee Marina on the Grevelingenmeer. For the North Sea coast, consider Kats Marina on Noord-Beveland or Brouwershaven Marina at Grevelingen's entrance.

Which boat to rent

  1. Motorboat (6, 9 m), best for exploring canals and lakes, 4, 6 guests, from EUR 250 half-day.
  2. Luxury motor yacht, perfect for coastal cruising, e.g. Fairline Targa 43, 6, 8 guests, from EUR 800 half-day. For full details visit the Fairline Targa 43 charter page.
  3. Lagoon catamaran, stable and spacious, 8, 10 guests, from EUR 1,200 full-day.
  4. Axopar 28, open cabin boat suitable for watersports, 6 guests, from EUR 350 half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Zeeland?

Prices range from EUR 150 for a shared tour to EUR 2,500 for a crewed luxury yacht. One option worth a look is the Fairline Targa 43 charter page.

  • Shared tour (2 hours): from EUR 150 per person.
  • Small motorboat half-day: EUR 250, 450.
  • Catamaran full-day: EUR 1,000, 1,600.
  • Crewed motor yacht full-day: EUR 1,800, 2,500.

For a full range, consider comparing verified boat listings via yacht charter in Zeeland on BoatHire24, which aggregates operators across the province.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Zeeland?

In Zeeland, boats under 15 m typically require a small boat licence or ICC, but many operators offer licenceless rentals after a safety briefing.

Always confirm with the operator during booking. The Dutch Small Boat Licence (Vaarbewijs I) is common for larger inland vessels, while coastal charters may ask for ICC. Each listing on BoatHire24 mentions requirements. If you own a boat, you can become a host and earn from spare days.

Locals advise checking the wind conditions on the Grevelingenmeer before setting out; the area is known for its steady breezes in summer.

When is the best season to rent a boat in Zeeland?

The peak season runs from May to September, with July and August offering the warmest weather and reliable south-westerly winds.

Spring and autumn also provide pleasant sailing with fewer crowds. The 2026 calendar includes many public holidays, so book early for summer weekends.

At a glance

  • Price range: EUR 150, 2,500.
  • Peak months: May, September.
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full-day.
  • Capacity: 1, 10 guests.
  • Currency: EUR.

Questions about boat rental in Zeeland

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Zeeland?

Yes, many operators offer licenceless motorboats up to a certain power, provided you complete a safety briefing.

What is the best route from Roompot Marina?

A popular route is a 12 nm loop: head east to Veerse Meer, stop at Veere for lunch, then return via the canal.

Are there any hidden costs in Zeeland boat rental?

Fuel is typically charged extra; some deposits are around EUR 500 refundable. Always read the listing details.

Closing thoughts

Renting a boat in Zeeland offers varied waters from the Veerse Meer to the Grevelingenmeer. Whether you choose a day trip or a longer charter, booking via BoatHire24 simplifies the process. If you own a boat in the region, consider partnering with BoatHire24 to earn extra income. You can become a host by listing your vessel on the platform.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Zeeland and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
